nameMeanings.name: Spencer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name for someone who dispensed provisions or money, from Middle English spenser(e), spencer(e) ‘household steward, butler, almoner’ (Anglo-Norman French espenser, Old French despensier). Compare Spence and Spender . There is some dispute about the origins of the Spencer family, whose most famous member in recent times was the late Princess of Wales, born Lady Diana Spencer (1961–97). Some sources say that they are descended from William the Conqueror's steward, Robert Despencer. What is clear is that by the 15th century they had become prosperous from sheep farming in Northamptonshire. Robert Spencer (died 1627) was said to be the wealthiest man in England. Their titles have included Earls of Sunderland and Earls Spencer; and through the female line the 5th Earl of Sunderland also became Duke of Marlborough in 1733. This connection was the result of the marriage, in 1700, of the 3rd Duke of Sunderland to the daughter of John Churchill, 1st Duke of Marlborough. The youngest son of this union, John Spencer (1708–46), was the father of the 1st Earl Spencer (1734–83).

variants.name: Spence
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname for a servant employed in the pantry of a great house or monastery, from Middle English spense, spence ‘pantry, larder, storeroom’ (Old French despense, from a Late Latin derivative of dispendere, past participle dispensus ‘to weigh out or dispense’). Compare Spencer .

variants.name: Spender
meanings: occupational name or status name from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘steward, treasurer’, a shortened form of Middle English, Old French despendour, denoting someone who managed money or supplies. Compare Spencer .
alternatively, perhaps a nickname from Middle English spender(e), spendour ‘spender (of money), spendthrift’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert Spencer was born on 18 May 1460, in Cople, Bedfordshire, England as the son of Sir John Spencer Gentleman and Mrs. John Spencer. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Anne Pecke. He died on 10 September 1521, in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Spencer est né le 18 mai 1460, à Cople, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir John Spencer Gentleman et Mrs. John Spencer. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Anne Pecke. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1521, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Spencer wurde am 18. Mai 1460 in Cople, Bedfordshire, England, als Sohn von Sir John Spencer Gentleman und Mrs. John Spencer geboren. Er hatte mit Anne Pecke mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. September 1521 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Spencer è nato il il 18 maggio 1460 nel Cople, Bedfordshire, England come figlio di Sir John Spencer Gentleman e Mrs. John Spencer. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Anne Pecke. Morì il 10 settembre 1521, nel Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Spencerは1460年5月18日にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアコプルでSir John Spencer GentlemanとMrs. John Spencerの息子として生まれた。彼はAnne Peckeとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1521年9月10日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアで61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Spencer(은)는 1460년 5월 18일 영국 베드퍼드실르 코플에서 Sir John Spencer Gentleman(와)과 Mrs. John Spencer의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Anne Pecke(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1521년 9월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르에서 61세의 나이로 사망했다.
